title: Hero
why_this_song: Hero by Mariah Carey (1993) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "There's a hero"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "That a hero lies in you"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "If you look inside your heart"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And the sorrow that you know"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And you'll finally see the truth"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: That a hero lies in you
When you face the world alone
No one reaches out a hand
That a hero lies in you

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hero" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hero" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lies" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lies" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: If you look inside your heart

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Hero" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Hero"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Mariah Carey one question about "Hero", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Mariah Carey sobre "Hero", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Hero" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Hero" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
